ci_failure.notes: Deploy to Azure failed on commit 9a396ab (second push after canary inject)

issue_created.notes: CI Failure Router run 22549418391 created issue via GH_AW_GITHUB_TOKEN

auto_dispatch.notes: Initial dispatch (run 22549420692) SKIPPED — ran old workflow code from 9a396ab which had broken label check. Manual label toggle at 18:20:35Z retriggered against fixed 678f55e.

repair_pr.notes: repo-assist opened PR: [Pipeline] Fix CS1002: add missing semicolon in DrillCanary.cs

auto_merge.notes: PR review agent approved, pr-review-submit enabled auto-merge, PR merged

main_recovered.notes: Deploy to Azure succeeded on merge commit 0e2103b

verdict_reason: All 7 stages passed. auto_dispatch required manual label retrigger because fix commit 678f55e was not yet on main when initial issues:labeled events fired (they ran old code from 9a396ab). This is a one-time bootstrapping issue, not a steady-state gap.
lessons_learned: issues:labeled runs workflow from default branch HEAD at event time, not from the commit being pushed — fix must be on main BEFORE the event fires
github.event.label.name only contains the single label that triggered the event, not all labels — use contains(github.event.issue.labels.*.name) instead
Per-issue concurrency groups (auto-dispatch-pipeline-$ISSUE_NUMBER) correctly deduplicate burst label events
Shell heredocs with embedded backticks are interpreted as command substitution — use single-quoted variables + printf instead
workflow_run events resumed working after the router shell fix in 9a396ab — the earlier breakage may have been caused by invalid YAML/shell in the workflow file
